title: senecio visianus
intro: Senecio visianus, also known as Viscayan ragwort, is a plant species in the dandelion-like genus Senecio. It is a perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, and may be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems. Senecio visianus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
